instruction: Describe the role of HTTP headers in this vulnerability.
input: IBM Emptoris Sourcing 10.1.0, 10.1.1, and 10.1.3 is vulnerable to web cache poisoning, caused by improper input validation by modifying HTTP request headers. IBM X-Force ID: 190987.
output: In this vulnerability, HTTP request headers are improperly validated, allowing malicious actors to craft headers that poison web caches, potentially leading users to malicious content instead of legitimate data.
